title: Repository Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for the .github/workflows/aw.json repository-level configuration file for gh-aw agentic workflows

action_pins.description: Mapping of action repository@version references to replacement repository@version references. Enables enterprises running in a private cloud to redirect actions to internal mirrors. Keys and values must use the format 'owner/repo@ref'.

additionalProperties.description: Replacement repository@version to use instead of the source action.

ghes.description: Enable GitHub Enterprise Server (GHES) compatibility mode. Artifact actions continue to use latest non-v3 pins because upload-artifact/download-artifact v3 are deprecated.

help_command.description: Enable or disable the builtin centralized /help slash command handler. Defaults to true when omitted. Set to false to disable.

utc.description: Project home UTC offset used when rendering local times in CLI output. Must be a numeric UTC offset such as +00:00 or -08:00.

auto_upgrade.description: When true, the compiler generates agentic-auto-upgrade.yml that runs on a fuzzy weekly schedule and inlines the 'upgrade' operation to check for and report available workflow upgrades via a GitHub issue. Defaults to false (opt-in).

maintenance.description: Configuration for the agentic-maintenance workflow. Set to false to disable maintenance entirely, or provide an object to configure it.

oneOf.description: Set to false to disable agentic maintenance and refuse features that rely on it (such as expires).
Agentic maintenance workflow configuration. Enables generation of agentics-maintenance.yml.

runs_on.description: The runner or runners to use for maintenance workflow jobs. Accepts a single label string or an array of labels.

oneOf.description: A single runner label for maintenance workflow jobs.
An array of runner labels for maintenance workflow jobs.

action_failure_issue_expires.description: Expiration time in hours for action failure issues opened by the conclusion job. Defaults to 168 (7 days).

label_triggers.description: Set to false to disable all label-triggered jobs (disable_agentic_workflow, label_apply_safe_outputs, etc.). When absent or true (default), all label-triggered jobs are included in the maintenance workflow.

disabled_jobs.description: Maintenance workflow job IDs to skip when generating agentics-maintenance.yml. Supported IDs are close-expired-entities, apply_safe_outputs, label_disable_agentic_workflow, and label_apply_safe_outputs. Values are case-insensitive; underscores and hyphens are treated equivalently.

compile.description: Configuration for the compile-workflows maintenance job.

create_pull_request_github_token.description: GitHub Actions secret name used by the compile-workflows job for GitHub API calls and branch pushes when compile drift should create or update a deduplicated pull request instead of opening an issue.
